interaction_phrase: an international team of researchers from Queen Mary University of London, the
occurrence_sentence: An international team of researchers from Queen Mary University of London, the University of Oxford, Lancaster University, and the University of Waterloo have developed a new single-molecule transistor that uses quantum interference to control the flow of electrons.
